description: Curated root-cause bug pattern seed pack. Patterns are priors for search and review, not proof.

patterns.title: Windows service stop handler does not signal worker shutdown
symptoms: sc stop does not stop the service
process keeps running after stop request
root_causes: SERVICE_CONTROL_STOP handler returns without setting the shared stop event or cancellation flag
worker loop waits forever because it never observes the shutdown signal
out_of_range_cases: stopEvent is null
stop flag remains false after SERVICE_CONTROL_STOP
worker thread waits with INFINITE timeout
verification_probes: log entry and exit of SERVICE_CONTROL_STOP handler
assert SetEvent(stopEvent) or cancellation flag is reached
trace SetServiceStatus transitions to SERVICE_STOPPED

sources.evidence: Common fixed pattern in Windows service issue and PR threads; hydrate with github-search for project-specific citations.

patterns.title: Windows service status remains STOP_PENDING or RUNNING
root_causes: service shutdown path does not call SetServiceStatus with SERVICE_STOPPED on every exit path
checkpoint and wait hint are updated without final stopped transition
out_of_range_cases: error path exits before SERVICE_STOPPED
stop pending loop increments checkpoint forever
worker error path skips final status update
verification_probes: trace every shutdown return path for SetServiceStatus(SERVICE_STOPPED)
inject worker startup failure and stop failure paths
capture SCM status transitions

sources.evidence: Common Windows service shutdown root-cause pattern.

patterns.title: Blocking worker call ignores service stop cancellation
symptoms: service cannot stop while waiting for IO
root_causes: worker thread blocks on a synchronous wait, socket, pipe, or device call that is not made cancelable by the stop path
shutdown flag is checked only before entering a blocking call
out_of_range_cases: INFINITE wait has no stop event in the wait set
CancelIoEx is never called for pending IO
shutdown flag changes while worker is blocked
verification_probes: trace pending IO count during stop
assert stop event participates in every blocking wait
force IO timeout and observe worker exit

sources.evidence: Common service and daemon cancellation pattern.

patterns.title: Driver pending IRP has no safe cancel path
root_causes: IRP is queued pending without a cancel routine or cancel-safe queue
cancel path races with completion path and leaves the IRP owned by neither side
out_of_range_cases: IRP canceled after being queued
cleanup runs while request remains pending
cancel routine pointer is null
verification_probes: force CancelIoEx from user mode while IRP is pending
log cancel routine install/remove ownership transitions
assert every pending IRP completes exactly once

sources.evidence: Common WDM/KMDF pending request root-cause pattern.

patterns.title: Driver runs paged or blocking code at elevated IRQL
root_causes: callback can run at DISPATCH_LEVEL but calls paged code, waits, allocates paged memory, or touches pageable state
IRQL precondition is assumed but not checked
out_of_range_cases: callback arrives at DISPATCH_LEVEL
spin lock is held while calling pageable helper
PagedPool allocation happens above PASSIVE_LEVEL
verification_probes: assert KeGetCurrentIrql before every blocking or paged helper
run verifier IRQL checking
mark callback path and pool type in traces

sources.evidence: Common Windows kernel crash root-cause pattern.

patterns.title: Driver unload misses outstanding reference cleanup
root_causes: unload path unregisters only part of callbacks/timers/work items
reference counted objects are not decremented on error or teardown path
out_of_range_cases: registration handle is overwritten or null at unload
work item can requeue after unload starts
reference count never reaches zero
verification_probes: trace every register/unregister pair
assert no work item/timer active after unload begins
run driver verifier pool and reference checks

patterns.title: IOCTL handler trusts user buffer size or decoded length
root_causes: handler checks outer buffer length but trusts an embedded length/count/offset field
METHOD_NEITHER or pointer payload is used without probing and bounds validation
out_of_range_cases: embedded count exceeds InputBufferLength
offset plus size overflows
user pointer is null or invalid
verification_probes: fuzz IOCTL buffers with zero, short, huge, and overflowed lengths
assert decoded offsets fit the original buffer
trace rejected command codes

patterns.title: Party member count is stale after invite or kick churn
symptoms: party member limit can be bypassed
extra party member invited after kick
root_causes: invite eligibility checks cached member count while kick/removal replication or backend confirmation is still pending
member count is decremented or incremented on only one of several invite/kick paths
out_of_range_cases: MemberCount differs from PartyMembers.Num()
PendingInvites are not counted against MaxMembers
kick pending state allows invite before removal commits
verification_probes: log MemberCount, PartyMembers.Num, PendingInvites for invite and kick events
assert invite guard uses authoritative committed plus pending count
run invite/kick/invite sequence on server authority

sources.evidence: Common multiplayer party state bug pattern.

patterns.title: Server RPC lacks authority or ownership validation
symptoms: inventory or party state changes without permission
root_causes: Server RPC validates shape but not actor ownership, controller ownership, authority role, or current state
client-predicted state is trusted as authoritative
out_of_range_cases: requesting player does not own target actor
actor is not in expected gameplay state
validation returns true for stale or null owner
verification_probes: test RPC from non-owner client
assert server compares RequestingPlayer against authoritative owner
log role and owner for every state-mutating RPC

sources.evidence: Common Unreal multiplayer security root-cause pattern.

patterns.title: RepNotify order leaves dependent state inconsistent
symptoms: client state flickers or becomes invalid
root_causes: RepNotify handler assumes another replicated property has already arrived
dependent caches are rebuilt only in one OnRep path
out_of_range_cases: OnRep fires before initialization
dependent property still has old value
cache not invalidated when replicated array changes
verification_probes: trace OnRep ordering and dependent cache values
force packet loss/reorder in net emulation
assert cache rebuild occurs after every replicated source update

patterns.title: Inventory or currency update double-spends across async callbacks
root_causes: client or server accepts repeated async completion without idempotency
pending transaction state is cleared too late or not bound to a unique request id
out_of_range_cases: same TransactionId is applied twice
ItemCount goes negative
callback arrives after cancel or retry
verification_probes: replay duplicate completion callback with same transaction id
assert balance transition is idempotent
log request id through start, retry, cancel, and completion

patterns.title: Client prediction lacks rollback for rejected server state
symptoms: client shows action success but server rejects it
root_causes: predicted local mutation is not rolled back when authoritative response rejects or corrects it
prediction key or sequence is not associated with the server correction
out_of_range_cases: server rejects action but predicted flag remains true
correction sequence is older than local prediction
rollback path does not restore dependent cache
verification_probes: force server rejection after local prediction
assert predicted state is cleared by correction
trace prediction key lifecycle

patterns.title: Backend side effect lacks idempotency key
root_causes: handler performs side effects before checking or storing an idempotency key
retry path has no unique request key or unique constraint
out_of_range_cases: same request id reaches handler twice
network timeout causes client retry after commit
unique key is not enforced at database boundary
verification_probes: send duplicate POST with same idempotency key
simulate timeout after DB commit
assert unique constraint rejects duplicate transaction id

patterns.title: Stale authorization cache permits revoked access
symptoms: revoked user can still access resource
unauthorized action succeeds after role removal
root_causes: authorization decision is cached without invalidation on role or ownership change
cached subject/resource tuple omits tenant, scope, or version
out_of_range_cases: roleVersion changes but cache key stays the same
tenant id missing from cache key
permission revoked before TTL expiry
verification_probes: revoke role and retry request before cache TTL
assert cache key includes tenant, scope, and version
trace cache hit after permission mutation

patterns.title: Transaction reads stale invariant before concurrent update
root_causes: code checks invariant outside a serializable transaction or without row lock
read-modify-write sequence is not atomic
out_of_range_cases: two transactions read the same count then both insert
updatedRows is zero but success is returned
limit is checked before lock acquisition
verification_probes: run two concurrent requests against same resource
assert invariant check and write happen under the same lock/transaction
verify affected row count

patterns.title: Pagination cursor boundary skips or duplicates records
root_causes: cursor comparison uses inclusive boundary where exclusive is required
sort key is not stable or omits tie-breaker id
cursor encodes only timestamp while multiple rows share it
out_of_range_cases: two records have same timestamp
cursor item is included again
page size exactly equals limit
verification_probes: seed duplicate timestamps around page boundary
assert order includes stable tie-breaker
request consecutive pages and check unique ids

patterns.title: Frontend async handler uses stale closure state
root_causes: async callback captures stale state value instead of using functional update or current ref
effect dependency array omits a variable used by the callback
out_of_range_cases: two updates race and second applies old state
effect runs with stale selectedId
callback resolves after component state changed
verification_probes: trigger two rapid UI actions before async completion
assert functional state update is used for dependent updates
enable exhaustive-deps lint for effect

sources.evidence: Common frontend state management root-cause pattern.

patterns.title: Optimistic UI update has no rejection rollback
symptoms: UI shows success after server rejection
deleted item reappears or remains deleted incorrectly
root_causes: optimistic mutation updates local cache but error path does not revert or refetch
request identity is not checked before applying success or failure callback
out_of_range_cases: server rejects request but local cache remains mutated
older mutation response overwrites newer state
rollback snapshot is missing
verification_probes: force API rejection after optimistic update
assert rollback snapshot is restored
race two mutations and check mutation id ordering

patterns.title: Go CLI agent misclassifies document-generation request as read-only
symptoms: agent does not create requested file
root_causes: intent classifier marks planning or analysis as read-only and suppresses write-capable tools
completion path does not assert expected artifact existence before final response
out_of_range_cases: prompt asks to create a file but readOnlyAnalysis is true
write tool is removed from allowed tool list
final response skips artifact existence check
verification_probes: trace intent classification and allowed tools for document requests
assert artifact path exists before final answer
unit test create-file prompt against tool routing

patterns.title: Context compaction drops required output artifact state
symptoms: agent forgets to generate a requested file
long-running task final answer omits artifact
root_causes: compaction summary preserves discussion but not required file paths or pending artifact checklist
resume path trusts old plan status without revalidating filesystem outputs
out_of_range_cases: pending artifact list is empty after compaction
plan says completed but file does not exist
resume loads summary without output path
verification_probes: compact after requesting a file and verify pending artifact survives
resume and assert file existence before final answer
persist artifact checklist in session state
